positive: A whimsical, symmetrical forest scene designed as a repeating pattern. The foreground features bioluminescent flora, stylized stylized glowing mushrooms, and delicate vine structures intertwined with silhouettes of woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, owls) resting within the foliage. The composition should be centered and vertically balanced, utilizing deep emerald, sapphire, and violet tones contrasted with neon lime accents for the glowing elements. Highly detailed, vector illustration style with strong outlines, designed for direct placement on apparel. Mysterious, magical forest atmosphere, highly graphic, print-friendly, clean silhouette, symmetrical repetition.
